Text: Create a new building blueprint from the selected area
Hold the button to select an area. A building must be enclosed within the area to be included in the blueprint.
Use a building blueprint to place buildings in the world

• Rotate the blueprint with the rotate keys (default R and Shift R) while placing it.
• Flip the blueprint with the flip key (default F) while placing it.
• Hold Alternate button (default Shift) to partially place any valid buildings and ignore invalid ones.
Quickly demolish all buildings that were placed using a building blueprint
